comments:
One adult on nest
Four juveniles walking and chirping off nest
3 nests at Carter Drive new build.
Feeding on the bricks of an Edinburgh street
All Black Sea duck with white wing patch. Yellow tip to bill with less pronounced knob than other similar scoters. White eye spot. Photos attached.
Single bird calling persistently wet-my-lips from rough grass adjoining 2 nd fairway at Luffness GC
Continuing bird, seen from dirt track at the Eastern side of the quarry with hundreds of Greylag geese, female bird. Very orange goose-like waterfowl with pale face and dark bill and legs.
Female at East End of Whitesands - dark cap, grey cheeks, with common Pochards.  Well documented already.
Flew over the A1 from the bordering trees. Mid sized bird, flight wasn't Pigeon or even Mistle Thrush like.
